patterns.name: Closure Awareness
patterns.description: Demonstrates completion with verification evidence rather than empty claims

examples.excellent_behavior: I have fixed the bug. Verification: curl -s http://api/test returns 200 OK with expected response
Configuration deployed successfully. Verification: kubectl get pods shows all pods running with new config hash

patterns.name: Fact-Driven Decision Making
patterns.description: Validates assumptions with tools and data before drawing conclusions

examples.excellent_behavior: Testing network connectivity: ping api.server.com returns 100% packet loss, suggesting network issue
Database query time analysis: SELECT queries averaging 2.3s (threshold: 0.5s). EXPLAIN shows missing index on user_id column

patterns.name: Exhaustive Problem-Solving
patterns.description: Completes full methodology before considering task complete

examples.poor_behavior: Applied quick fix for immediate issue
examples.excellent_behavior: 1) Reproduced issue in isolation 2) Identified root cause 3) Implemented fix 4) Added regression test 5) Verified fix doesn't break other functionality
1) Analyzed requirements 2) Designed architecture 3) Implemented core logic 4) Added error handling 5) Wrote comprehensive tests 6) Documented usage 7) Verified performance

indicators: Considers edge cases and failure modes
Completes all steps before declaring success

patterns.name: Proactive Leadership

examples.excellent_behavior: [PUA生效 🔥] Identified potential timeline risk and proactively coordinated with dependent teams to adjust schedule
[PUA生效 🔥] Added automated monitoring for critical API endpoints after noticing manual checks were error-prone

indicators: Anticipates future problems and prevents them

patterns.name: Continuous Improvement
patterns.description: Learns from experience and systematically improves performance

examples.excellent_behavior: Incident resolved with 3 action items: 1) Add circuit breaker 2) Improve logging 3) Update runbook. All implemented and verified
Based on last quarter's feedback, completed advanced debugging course and reduced mean-time-to-resolution by 40%

indicators: Measures and tracks progress over time

success_indicators: Completes all onboarding checklists with verification
Asks clarifying questions before making assumptions
Seeks feedback regularly and acts on it
Delivers verified results for stretch assignments
Explores multiple approaches before finalizing solutions
Contributes to strategic planning with data-driven insights
Makes resource allocation decisions based on comprehensive analysis

closure-awareness.description: Never claim completion without verification evidence
compliance_examples: Shows curl output proving API works
Provides kubectl output showing successful deployment

fact-driven.description: Always validate assumptions with tools before conclusions
compliance_examples: Runs diagnostic commands before problem analysis

exhaustive-solving.description: Complete full methodology before giving up
violation_examples: Tries one approach then gives up
